a:["$","$L14",null,{"code":"db_path: ./memory.db\nembedding:\nmodel: text-embedding-3-small\napi_key: your-openai-api-key\n\nmemory:\nworking_max: 1000\nconsolidation_interval: 3600\n\nretrieval:\nvector_weight: 0.7\ntext_weight: 0.3\ntop_k: 10\n","language":"yaml"}]
